ber:D acu ay tgam iḍelli kennemti d Tom﹖
ber:Ziri werǧin ixemmem s tidet ad yeqqel d ineslem
ber:Ziri werǧin yeswingem s tidet ad yeqqel d ineslem
ber:Ula d argaz ameṛkanti akk deg umaḍal ur yezmir ad d-iseɣ tayri n tidet s yedrimen
